_doc: Inner thought daemon 自适应 propose 质量 gate. propose 类 actionable (suggest_inside_joke / propose_protocol) 受 salience >= sal_threshold gate. 周期反思 24h activate rate 动态调阈值: rate 高 → 降阈 (放松); rate 低 → 升阈 (收紧). Sir CLI: scripts/propose_quality_dump.py (TODO).
_jaccard_dedup_note: 🆕 [governor Phase 2 F5 / Sir 2026-05-29 拍板] propose hard jaccard dedup. daemon 入口拦截 (suggest_inside_joke / propose_protocol), 比 relational_state 现有 0.7 dedup 更严 (default 0.5). 命中 → actionable_result = 'jaccard_dedup_rejected:overlap_with_<id>:<jaccard>', LLM 下轮看到具体 id 学习不重复. 修复缺口 ④. enabled false 关 F5 hard guard (仅保 relational 0.7 fallback). threshold range 0.0-1.0 (sanity cap). 详 docs/JARVIS_THINKING_BRAIN_GOVERNOR_DESIGN.md §5 F5.
